title: Analytics - Logout Initiated
scenario: Firebase analytics logs logout event when user signs out of Poly account in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap on the 'Log Out' or 'Sign Out' option.
4. Confirm the logout action if prompted.
5. Observe the Firebase analytics event that is triggered upon logout.
expected: A Firebase analytics event is logged when the user logs out. The event includes default event data such as event count by country, gender, app version, app build, and app environment.
